title: Elytra Control
description: Simple Mod To Control Your Elytra Such Locking Or Stop Flying In Mid Air Like In Bedrock Edition and more!
body:
# Elytra Control

**Elytra Control** is a lightweight Minecraft mod that enhances your Elytra flight experience with **precise** and **customizable control options**.
It provides various flight utilities such as disabling flight, canceling midair glides, and simplifying takeoff mechanics — all configurable to suit your playstyle.

## Requirements

This mod requires the following dependencies to work properly:

### For versions **below `0.3.3+1.21.9`**

| Modrinth                                                                    | Curseforge                                                                                      |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [Smootheez Config Lib (scl)](https://modrinth.com/mod/smootheez-config-lib) | [Smootheez Config Lib (scl)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smootheez-config-lib) |

### For versions **`0.3.3+1.21.9` and above**

| Modrinth                                                | Curseforge                                                                  |
|---------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [Smoothiez API](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothiez-api) | [Smoothiez API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smoothiez-api) |
| [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)       | [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)       |

## Preview

Experience smoother and more controlled Elytra flight with three major features designed for flexibility and ease of use.

### Disable Fly

Completely disable Elytra flight when needed.
You can customize the on-screen overlay with the following display modes:

* Icon only
* Text + Icon
* Text only
* Hidden (no overlay)

Overlay position is also fully adjustable.

![Disable Fly Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Smootheez/Elytra-Control/refs/heads/dev/assets/disable_elytra_preview.gif)

### Cancel Fly

Instantly cancel your Elytra flight midair — perfect for **safe landings** or **quick maneuvering**.
Keybinds are fully customizable:

* Use the default jump behavior
* Or assign your own custom key

![Cancel Fly Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Smootheez/Elytra-Control/refs/heads/dev/assets/cancel_fly_action_preview.gif)

### Easy Fly

Take off effortlessly with this optional feature that simplifies Elytra launching.
It’s **disabled by default**, and can be enabled via:

* The **config menu** *(requires Mod Menu)*, or
* The **config file** in your `config` directory

You can also assign a keybind to toggle Easy Fly on or off.
*(Note: the toggle keybind is unassigned by default.)*

![Easy Fly Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Smootheez/Elytra-Control/refs/heads/dev/assets/easy_fly_action_preview.gif)
![Disable Easy Fly Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Smootheez/Elytra-Control/refs/heads/dev/assets/disable_easy_fly_preview.gif)

## Configuration

All features can be configured to fit your preferences.
You can modify settings either **in-game** (via Mod Menu) or **manually** through the configuration file.

Available options include:

* Toggling each Elytra feature
* Adjusting overlay position and display mode
* Rebinding custom flight control keys

## Download

Get the latest version from your preferred platform:

| Modrinth                                                      | Curseforge                                                                        |
|---------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **[Elytra Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-control)** | **[Elytra Control](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-control)** |

## Reporting Issues

Found a bug or want to suggest a new feature?
Please open an issue on GitHub: [**GitHub Issues**](https://github.com/Smootheez/Elytra-Control/issues)
